title: Most people get these 3 AI terms wrong
summary: Jeff Su argues that AI hallucination is the same mechanism enabling creativity versus inaccuracy, that context window acts like a fixed-size whiteboard with information dropout, and that tokens are discrete chunks of text with associated costs that explain usage limits.
